title: Jorge Henríquez

(born 17 June 1994) is a Chilean [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who plays as a [midfielder](/wiki/Midfielder "Midfielder") for [Deportes Concepción](/wiki/Deportes_Concepci%C3%B3n_(Chile) "Deportes Concepción (Chile)").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

@coquimbounidooficial; (10 January 2024). ["📝¡OTRO PIRATA A LA TRIPULACIÓN! 💛☠️🖤"](https://www.instagram.com/p/C17Z5e6uC4u/) (in Spanish). Retrieved 10 January 2024 – via [Instagram](/wiki/Instagram "Instagram").

Sánchez, Francisco (9 December 2025). ["Brilló este año en Primera con 9 goles, clasificó a Sudamericana y hoy sorprende con esta decisión: "Me llevo grandes...""](https://chile.as.com/futbol/brillo-este-ano-en-primera-con-9-goles-clasifico-a-sudamericana-y-hoy-sorprende-con-esta-decision-me-llevo-grandes-f202512-n/). *[Diario AS](/wiki/Diario_AS "Diario AS")* (in Spanish). Retrieved 10 December 2025.

Ortega, Pablo (25 December 2025). ["Concepción no para y suma otra figura de 2025: quinto fichaje en el mercado"](https://chile.as.com/futbol/concepcion-no-para-y-suma-otra-figura-de-2025-quinto-fichaje-en-el-mercado-f202512-n/). *[Diario AS](/wiki/Diario_AS "Diario AS")* (in Spanish). Retrieved 25 December 2025.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Chilean footballer (born 1994)

In this [Spanish name](/wiki/Spanish_name "Spanish name"), the first or paternal [surname](/wiki/Surname "Surname") is  *Henríquez* and the second or maternal family name is  *Neira*.

**Jorge Alexis Henríquez Neira** (born 17 June 1994) is a Chilean [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who plays as a [midfielder](/wiki/Midfielder "Midfielder") for [Deportes Concepción](/wiki/Deportes_Concepci%C3%B3n_(Chile) "Deportes Concepción (Chile)").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Career

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Jorge_Henr%C3%ADquez&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Career")]

In 2024, Henríquez signed with [Coquimbo Unido](/wiki/Coquimbo_Unido "Coquimbo Unido").[[2]](#cite_note-2) The next year, he switched to [Cobresal](/wiki/C.D._Cobresal "C.D. Cobresal").[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)

In December 2025, Henríquez joined [Deportes Concepción](/wiki/Deportes_Concepci%C3%B3n_(Chile) "Deportes Concepción (Chile)").[[5]](#cite_note-5)
